chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Execution No. 35 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on CMA No.1570/23 (urgent) 2.For order on Execution Application 24.07.2023 M/s. Ahmed Masood and Muhammad Altaf, Advocate a/w Abdul Sattar Qureshi/Decree Holder (CNIC No.42201-4517726-1) Nasir Ilyas/JD No.1 (CNIC No.42301-5818397-1), Jawad Adil/JD No.2 (CNIC No.42301-10811470-9) & Tabish Ismail/JD No.3(CNIC No.42301-79714111-1) ---------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. This is an Execution Application arising out of a decree dated 05.05.2023 passed in Suit No.1828/2020. Pursuant to the compromise, the Decree Holder had deposited a sum of Rs.73.5 million in compliance of the Order dated 12.11.2021 to be deposited with the Nazir and that the successful party would be entitled to the profit accrued thereon. Meanwhile the matter was settled by compromise. Judgment Debtor Nos.1, 2 and 3 are present in person and waive notice of the Execution Application. They do not have any Objection for grant of the Execution. No claim/execution is sought by the Decree Holder against Judgment Debtor Nos.4 and 5. Execution is granted to the extent of Paragraph 6(c) and 7 of the Compromise Decree. The Nazir may release the amounts to the Decree Holder in terms of the Paragraph 6(c) and 7 of the Compromise Decree. Execution is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Ashraf
